title: Grilled Lamb Satay with Brazilian Spice Rub
description: A flavorful and aromatic grilled lamb dish from Brazil, marinated in a mixture of spices and herbs. Serve with a side of steamed vegetables or a fresh salad.

ingredients.name: Brazilian satay spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: Dry rub ingredients
ingredients.notes: see below for dry rub ingredients

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together dry rub ingredients.
Rub the spice blend all over the lamb skewers, making sure to coat evenly.
In a separate bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, and garlic.
Add the lamb skewers to the marinade and coat evenly.
Let the skewers marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Remove the skewers from the marinade and brush with olive oil.
Grill the skewers for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
